identity.name: Xentora Solutions
identity.description: A dark, tech-inspired sales automation platform that feels like a command center for the future of business.

typography.rules: Headings must use Outfit. Body text uses Manrope. Never use Inter for headings.

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-400 text-black hover:bg-cyan-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_rgba(6,182,212,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 font-bold tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-cyan-400/50 transition-all duration-300

cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl hover:border-cyan-500/30 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.default: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-cyan-400/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-400/20 text-white placeholder:text-slate-600 h-12

navigation.container: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/5
navigation.link: text-sm font-medium text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest

landing_page.hero: Asymmetrical split. Text left (60%), 3D/Abstract Visual right (40%). Background: Deep Void with 'Twisting Blue Lines' overlay.
landing_page.features: Bento Grid (Mode A). Mix of 'Hero', 'Square', and 'Tall' cards. Dark glassmorphism.
landing_page.how_it_works: Step-based vertical timeline or horizontal scroll cards.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation (fixed left). Top header (global actions). Main content area (scrollable).
dashboard.grid: High Density (Mode B). 'Trace Beam' borders for widgets. No card backgrounds—use borders only to define space.
dashboard.tables: Clean rows, border-b only. Hover row highlights. Status pills.

libraries.motion: framer-motion (use for staggered entrances and hover lifts)

universal_rules: NEVER use generic full-screen gradients. Use 'spotlight' radial gradients instead.
Text contrast MUST meet WCAG AA. Slate-400 on Black is okay for labels, but use White for body.
Padding is luxury. Use p-8 where you think p-4 is enough.
Interactive elements MUST have a hover state that changes brightness or adds a glow.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns/modals. Use solid dark colors with borders.
Use 'Outfit' font for all Headings. Use 'Manrope' for all Body text.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install 'lucide-react', 'framer-motion', 'recharts', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge'. Ensure fonts are imported in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.implementation_order: 1. Setup Global CSS/Fonts. 2. Build UI Components (Button, Input, Card). 3. Build Layout Shells. 4. Build Pages.
